heading: Today
text: Scattered rain showers with a chance for thunderstorms, some may become severe. Highs from the mid 70s to near 80, 80s in the warmer valleys. Winds varying from south to west near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph over the Greens.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered showers, with a chance for a few evening thunderstorms. Main impacts will be heavy rain, strong winds, and hail. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. Wind turning west at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Sunday
text: A good chance of showers, becoming more scattered in the afternoon. Cooler. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s south. Northwest wind turning north at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
